title: Historical Tech Collisions
description: Four independent wide-frame studies where different historical settings meet modern devices while preserving period-specific material detail.
creative_direction: Independent cultural collision studies: each image uses a different era, costume system, and technology object to test world knowledge, photorealism, and readable time-space contrast without reference dependencies.

en.title: Historical Tech Collisions
en.description: Four independent wide-frame studies where different historical settings meet modern devices while preserving period-specific material detail.

zh-CN.title: 历史科技碰撞单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立宽幅图让不同时代场景遇到现代科技,同时保留时代服饰和材质考据。
